title: The Visva-Bharati Act, 1951
full_text: The Visva-Bharati Act, 1951 विश्वी भारती अधिनियम, 1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195129 Act Number: 29 Enactment Date: 1951-05-09 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Visva-Bharati Act, 1951 Hindi Title: विश्वी भारती अधिनियम, 1951 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as "Visva-Bharati" to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its functioning as a unitary teaching and residential university. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 14-05-1951 Notification: 14th May, 1951, vide Notification No. F. 40-5/50-G, 3 dated the 10th May, 1951, Gazette of India, 1951, Part I. sec. 1. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Visva-Bharati Act, 1951 PRELIMINARY THE UNIVERSITY THE PARIDARSAKA (VISITOR) THE PRADHANA (RECTOR) OFFICERS OF THE UNIVERSITY AUTHORITIES OF THE UNIVERSITY STATUTES, ORDINANCES AND REGULATIONS ADMISSIOIN AND EXAMINATIONS ANNUAL REPORTS AND ACCOUNTS SUPPLEMENTARY PROVISIONS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of Visva-Bharati as an institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation. Section 5. Effect of incorporation of the University in certain cases. Section 5A. The objects of the University. Section 5B. Principles to be followed in organising activities of the University. Section 6. Powers of the University. Section 7. Territorial jurisdiction of the University. Section 7A. Maintenance of examination centres outside territorial limits. Section 8. University to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 9. Teaching at the University. Section 10. The Paridarsaka (Visitor). Section 11. The Pradhana (Rector). Section 12. Officers of the University. Section 13. The Acharya (Chancellor). Section 14. The Upacharya (Vice-Chancellor). Section 15. Omitted. Section 16. The Karma-Sachiva (Registrar). Section 17. Other officers. Section 18. Authorities of the University. Section 19. The Samsad (Court). Section 22. The Karma-Samiti (Executive Council). Section 24. The Siksha-Samiti (Academic Council). Section 25. Other authorities of the University. Section 26. Alumni Association. Section 27. Statutes. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Statutes, how made. Section 29. Matters to be provided for in the Ordinances. Section 30. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Regulations. Section 32. Residence. Section 33. Admission. Section 34. Examinations. Section 35. Annual report. Section 36. Annual Accounts. Section 37. Adhyapakas of the University to be appointed under a written contract. Section 38. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 38A. Power to suspend adhyapaka or other member of academic staff. Section 38B. Authorities by whom order for removal or dismissal or adhyapaka, etc., may be made and the procedure therefor. Section 39. Pension and provident funds. Section 40. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 41. Removal from membership of the University. Section 42. Disputes as to constitution of any University authority or body. Section 43. Constitution of committees. Section 44. Proceedings of the University authorities not invalidated by vacancies. Section 44A. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 44B. Mode of proof of University record. Section 45. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE.
